title: crotalaria pohliana var. regnellii
intro: Crotalaria pohliana var. regnellii, also known as the 'Regnell's rattlebox', is a plant species within the Crotalaria genus, belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and roots of Crotalaria pohliana var. regnellii are rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction to treat its various health benefits, although its usage should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
